Post-Surgery Recovery Care in Prospect Park, Florida

Recovering from surgery at home is proven to accelerate healing — but only when proper support is in place. Our post-surgery caregivers assist with mobility, pain management monitoring, wound care reminders, medication schedules, meal preparation, personal hygiene, and transportation to follow-up appointments. We help prevent complications and re-hospitalization.

Serving the Prospect Park area in Palm Beach County, our caregivers are background-checked, AHCA-licensed, bonded, and insured. Whether you need a few hours of post-surgery care per week or daily support, we create a personalized care plan that fits your family's needs and budget.

What's Included in Post-Surgery Care in Prospect Park

  • Safe mobility assistance — getting up, walking, stairs
  • Wound care reminders and incision monitoring
  • Medication schedule management and pain monitoring
  • Nutritious meal preparation for faster healing
  • Transportation to follow-up appointments
  • Reducing re-hospitalization and post-op complications

Frequently Asked Questions: Post-Surgery Care in Prospect Park

How soon after surgery can home care start?

Care can begin the same day of hospital discharge. We recommend scheduling in advance so your caregiver is ready when you arrive home.

How long is post-surgery care typically needed?

It varies by procedure — from a few days for minor surgery to several weeks for joint replacements or cardiac surgery. We create flexible plans that adjust as recovery progresses.

Do your caregivers perform wound care?

Our caregivers provide wound care reminders, assist with bandage changes per doctor instructions, and monitor for signs of infection — but complex medical wound care requires a licensed nurse.

Do you serve Prospect Park, FL?

Yes! Senior Trusted Home Care proudly serves Prospect Park and all communities in Palm Beach County, Florida. Our caregivers are local and familiar with the area.

How do I get started with post-surgery care in Prospect Park?

Simply call us at 561-621-5700 or visit our website to request a free consultation. We'll schedule an in-home assessment in Prospect Park at a time that works for you.
